archimate:Representation.name: NQads
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: NQuads is a serialization format used for representing RDF (Resource Description Framework) data that extends the capabilities of the N-Triples format. NQuads provides a straightforward and flexible way to express RDF data in a quad format, which includes an additional context or named graph component. This makes it suitable for representing RDF datasets that involve multiple named graphs or contexts.
Publisher: W3C
Source: https://www.w3.org/TR/n-quads/
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/NQadsRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/NQadsRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: NQuads is a serialization format used for representing RDF (Resource Description Framework) data that extends the capabilities of the N-Triples format. NQuads provides a straightforward and flexible way to express RDF data in a quad format, which includes an additional context or named graph component. This makes it suitable for representing RDF datasets that involve multiple named graphs or contexts.
